Description: Narrative play emphasises the story over everything else. Characters are defined mostly by their personal story-arcs, especially their backstory, and their effect on other stories. Challenges are generally narrative in nature. Characters are expected to fail before they learn to succeed.
Rules: Story beats Rules generally in Narrative play.

Description: Character play emphasises the characters over everything else. Player’s are expected to remain in character, even during narration. Plot’s and Stories are generally Character Arcs or are generated by Character Yarn-Tellers. Challenges are generally Character challenges such as overcoming Hitches.
Rules: Character beats Rules in Character play. In Character based play it is usual to not use Extras for NPCs instead using at least Archetype NPCs or Lite Characters.

Description: Realistic play emphasises realism over everything else. Characters are grounded. Challenges are usually everyday, emotional situations, or seem impossible.
